documents.title: Nominee Form 278
documents.summary: Pre-confirmation disclosure for Energy Secretary nominee. Lists outside positions including Chairman and CEO of Liberty Energy, Chairman of Liberty Resources, director seats at Oklo Inc., EMX Royalty, Urban Solution Group, Western Energy Alliance, Pacific Research Institute, Property and Environment Research Center, Domestic Energy Producers Alliance, and Bettering Human Lives Foundation.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Commits to resign from Liberty Energy, Liberty Resources, Liberty Midstream Solutions, Oklo Inc., EMX Royalty, Urban Solution Group, CL CoVault LLC, and several non-profit boards upon confirmation. Pledges to divest Liberty Energy, Oklo, EMX Royalty, and Urban Solution Group within 90 days. Lists retained positions as trustee of Family Revocable Trust and co-Managing Member of Sol 2 LLC, with recusal commitments for REOFF XXII, REOFF XXV, CrossHarbor Capital Partners, and several real-estate LLCs.

documents.title: Form 278T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses a series of Liberty Energy (LBRT) and Liberty Energy Class A sales running daily from 02/25/2025 through 03/13/2025, paired with offsetting purchases of Schwab Value Advantage Money Fund. Individual trade ranges run from $500,001-$1,000,000 up to $1,000,001-$5,000,000. All transactions marked No on the 30-day late notification flag.

documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: Self-certification confirming completion of resignations and divestitures within the 90-day deadline. Marks Yes on resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction report filings (citing 278-T filings dated 03/19/2025 and 04/29/2025), managed account notifications, interim recusals, and ongoing recusal obligations. Notes a Section 208 waiver received 03/07/2025 covering Liberty Energy stock that was accelerated after confirmation but prior to assumption of duties.

documents.title: Form 278T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses 28 purchase transactions from 03/17/2025 through 04/02/2025 across municipal bond funds (GAJPX, GGLPX), broad equity ETFs (SPY, SPMD), and Dodge & Cox International Stock Fund (DODFX). Individual amounts range from $50,001-$100,000 up to $250,001-$500,000. All marked No on the 30-day late notification flag.

documents.title: Form 278T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses two purchases of LLCs holding commercial real estate in San Francisco: REOFF XXVII, LLC on 05/30/2025 ($1,000,001-$5,000,000) and REOFF XXV, LLC on 06/05/2025 ($100,001-$250,000). Both marked No on the 30-day late notification flag.

documents.title: Form 278T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Discloses two purchases of LLCs holding commercial real estate in Colorado: GS Three, LLC (Glenwood Springs) on 01/02/2026 and Westside Link LLC (Denver) on 12/01/2025, each in the $250,001-$500,000 range. The Westside Link entry is marked Yes on the 30-day late notification flag.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Not independently verified via ProPublica cross-check; Wright did not appear in the surfaced portion of the database during this review.
